overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person perspective traveling along the shoulder of a desert highway at dusk. The camera moves steadily past various vehicles including trucks and motorcycles, with arid mountains and power lines visible in the background, passing a Route 1/Route 13 highway sign midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with mountain backdrop

events.description: large white commercial truck with 'BIG GOODS' branding passes by on the left lane
highway sign for Route 1 and Route 13 junction comes into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily along the gravel shoulder of the highway, maintaining pace with the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: large commercial truck passing by on the highway lanes

entered.detail: large arid mountains with reddish-brown rock faces forming the backdrop
tall metal lattice electricity pylon on the desert hillside
metal guardrail separating the shoulder from the asphalt highway lanes
dry rocky slope with sparse scrub vegetation rising on the right side
blue and white road sign indicating junction for Route 1 and Route 13

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway at dusk, with the camera moving along the gravel shoulder. Arid mountains rise in the distance while a large power line tower stands on the right hillside. Various vehicles including a large commercial truck pass by on the left. Toward the end of the segment, a highway sign for Route 1 and Route 13 comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway continuing through mountain valley with power line corridor

events.description: passes the Route 1 and Route 13 highway sign, continuing along the highway shoulder
motorcycle speeds past on the left highway lane

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the sky darkens toward evening, maintaining steady forward motion

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the highway lane

segments.scene_description: Having passed the highway sign, the camera continues along the desert highway as dusk deepens. The power line tower looms closer on the right side while the mountain range remains visible ahead. Traffic continues to pass by on the left, including a motorcycle that speeds past midway through the segment. The gravel shoulder and guardrail remain consistent as the journey continues through the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert highway shoulder as the light of dusk deepens across an arid landscape. It begins by gliding past a large commercial truck with distant mountains and a power line tower framing the horizon. As the camera advances, a highway sign for Route 1 and Route 13 emerges from the roadside before receding into the distance. The scene then shifts as the power line tower looms closer on the right, while a motorcycle speeds past on the left. Finally, the journey continues steadily along the gravel shoulder and guardrail, moving deeper into the darkening desert terrain.
